title: Verify 'Keep Trial & Set Reminder' button on Pause pop-up
description: Test the primary action on the Loss Aversion pop-up when trying to pause.
preconditions: The 'Pause Trial' Loss Aversion pop-up is open

steps.description: 2. On the pop-up, click the 'Keep Trial & Set Reminder' button.

expected_result: The pop-up closes, the user remains on the Trial Corner hub, and the 'Remind me' toggle is automatically enabled. The 'remind-me-clicked' event is fired.
